source.authorization: Ael explicitly authorized this public deposit in Warpkeep-Assets and requested that WorkerHegemony.glb retain its basename.
source.privateWorkflowMetadata: intentionally omitted from the public archive

designation.name: Hegemony worker 3D source set
designation.status: retains supplied game-unit filenames; internal scene identifies a horse-drawn wagon-family unit rather than a humanoid worker

license.scope: Publication and distribution of this named 3D package and its archive metadata are authorized as part of Warpkeep-Assets. No additional open-license grant, trademark right, or canonical-identity right is asserted.

sanitization.glb: byte-exact supplied source; no local paths, external URIs, emails, communication-platform markers, or long identifiers observed
sanitization.blend: public Blender 5.2 copy; path metadata only was normalized because the supplied container embedded absolute local production paths
sanitization.blendSemanticComparison: scenes, objects, meshes, topology, materials, packed images, armature, actions, modifiers, and bounds match the privately retained original exactly

validation.localOnlyVisualQa: GLB and Blend rendered as coherent no-telescope variants of the same horse-drawn wagon-family unit with intact materials and no clipping, corruption, or missing core geometry

knownContentEquivalence.relationship: WorkerHegemony.glb is byte-identical to two no-telescope aliases in the related supply-wagon 3D package; retention of this exact supplied basename is intentional.
